data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Time between steps (processing time)', but the evidence provided does not include any concrete data or checks that confirm the processing times between the various steps of the service. The linked use case outlines the expected processing times, but there is no evidence of actual measurements or validations performed to confirm these times, leading to a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of actual processing times between the steps.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add processing time validation checks
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the processing times between each step are recorded and meet the expected durations.
